title: Round 2 — State-event matrix (notes companion)
description: Schema for the per-entity notes JSON (e.g. round-2/<entity-id>-notes.json) that accompanies the authoritative Quint state machine in round-2/<entity-id>.qnt. The transition shape (next_state/guard/actions/output_events) lives in the .qnt; this file carries _note, rationale, source_evidence, uncertainty, and justification_ref — the fields Quint cannot enforce. The legacy transition fields remain accepted as optional prose mirrors during migration but are no longer authoritative.

next_state.description: Optional prose mirror of the .qnt transition. Authoritative form is the Quint branch.

guard.description: Optional prose mirror of the .qnt guard. Authoritative form is the Quint branch.

actions.description: Optional prose mirror of the .qnt action effects. Authoritative form is the Quint branch.

output_events.description: Optional prose mirror of the .qnt action's output events. Authoritative form is the Quint branch.

justification_ref.description: Required when kind == 'impossible'. References the invariant or mechanism that makes this cell unreachable.

source_evidence.description: Required in brownfield/mixed mode. file:line citation for where this cell's behavior is realized in code.
